description_long: This fence is constructed primarily from weathered wood, with a faded white paint that shows signs of age and exposure to the elements. The structure features a single horizontal rail and vertical boards, some of which are warped or damaged, giving the fence a rustic and neglected appearance. The top edge of the fence is slightly uneven, with no distinct decorative pattern or post caps visible. Vegetation, including overgrown shrubs or small trees, is present along one side, partially obscuring the fence and adding to its aged urban character. The base of the fence is surrounded by a patch of earth and sparse grass, suggesting it is situated in a garden or yard adjacent to a building with a white brick wall. The overall impression is of a utilitarian, old fence serving as a boundary in a residential or urban setting.
description: A weathered wooden fence with faded white paint, a single rail, and overgrown vegetation along one side. The fence appears rustic and aged, set against a white brick wall.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main face of the fence, with visible vertical boards, a single rail, and overgrown shrubs on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the fence and the curvature of the structure, with less detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the fence, showing more of the damaged boards and the connection to the ground.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, displaying the overgrown vegetation and the fence's uneven top edge.
